title: 10 best herbal tinctures for strep throat
description: Lemon verbena tinctures helps with strep throat because of its potent antimicrobial properties, which help combat the Streptococcus pyogenes bacteria that cause infection. The tincture's high concentration of citral and geraniol compounds work synergistically to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain, making it an effective natural remedy for soothing a sore throat.
